user_story: Discover the Hyperliquid perpetual asset universe via Byreal's perps namespace, then check the live mid prices and the order book for BTC. Read-only flow against api.hyperliquid.xyz; no wallet writes.

turns.prompt: Using Byreal's perps tools, list the available Hyperliquid perpetual assets and their leverage caps.
Now show me the current mid prices across all listed perps.
Snapshot the BTC order book so I can see top-of-book liquidity.
